summary: Comprehensive testing completed for tourism cluster website iteration 3. Core functionality working well with minor issues in logo scroll behavior and backend categories endpoint.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: String join operation failing on dictionary objects in test code
flaky_endpoints.workaround: API returns correct data, test formatting needs adjustment

design_issues.issue: Dynamic logo scroll behavior not fully implemented - hero logo doesn't fade and navigation logo doesn't appear on scroll

passed_tests: Backend API health check (90% success rate - 9/10 endpoints working)
Homepage hero section loading with proper gradient and content
Hero title and subtitle display correctly ('Descubre la Aventura')
Hero action buttons (Explorar Empresas, Ver Mapa) working and navigating properly
Stats section displaying 4 statistics correctly
Categories section showing 4 category cards with proper images
Featured companies section displaying companies
Interactive Leaflet map loading with proper tiles and markers
Map showing 2 custom markers representing companies with coordinates
Map category filters working correctly (Todas, Capacitación, Operadora de aventura)
Map company list showing 2 companies with filtering functionality
Admin authentication with admin/admin123 credentials working
Admin dashboard loading all 5 tabs (Empresas, Artículos, Categorías, Media, Configuración)
Admin Settings tab allowing hero image/title/subtitle editing
Admin Categories tab showing 5 categories (Capacitación, Operadora de aventura, Parque acuático, Hospedaje, Parque de aventura)
Admin Media tab with file upload functionality and media library (1 file present)
Admin Empresas tab showing 2 companies with edit/delete options
Admin Articles tab showing 3 articles with management options
Admin logout functionality working properly
Navigation between pages working correctly
Responsive design elements working on desktop viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement dynamic logo scroll behavior: hero logo should fade when scrolling and navigation logo should appear in the header. The scroll listener functionality mentioned in requirements is not fully implemented.
